productDisplayName: Puma Men Graphic Print Red Tshirt
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck in black, short sleeves with puma Leaping cat logo printed on the left sleeve, and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Wash and iron inside-out Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Designed for the carefree with a sporty touch, this Graphic T-shirt from puma makes for a perfect casual wear. Crafted from soft cotton, this T-shirt is sure to offer exemplary comfort, while the sporty graphic and contrast collar add an athletic feel that is sure to elevate it into a wardrobe favourite. Team it with jeans and sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
